meta.title: DEF CON 29 Aerospace Village - Allan Tart - Holistic View of a Flight with Crowd Sourced Data
meta.description: During the talk an overview will be given about how one can use crowd sourced data for creating a holistic view of flight. The data used for the purpose will include both ADS-B and VHF voice communications.
